description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and three stages: setup, build, and deploy. In the setup stage add a prepare job that runs apt-get update, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK zip, extracts it to android-sdk-linux, runs sdkmanager to install build-tools;27.0.3, build-tools;26.0.2, extras;android;m2repository, extras;google;m2repository, extras;google;google_play_services, platform-tools, and platforms;android-27, caches the android-sdk-linux directory with key androidsdk (pull policy) and stores it as an artifact. In the build stage add a build job that exports ANDROID_HOME=$PWD/android-sdk-linux, adds platform-tools to PATH, cd into NavigateAR, appends "android.builder.sdkDownload=false" to gradle.properties, chmod +x ./gradlew, and runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, publishing the debug APK at NavigateAR/app/build/outputs/apk/debug as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch of asu-capstone-team-6/ar-navigator, installs wget, downloads the gdrive binary, chmod +x gdrive, creates $HOME/.gdrive, writes $GDRIVE_ACCESS_CREDS to token_v2.json, and executes ./gdrive update --name NavigateAR.apk 1YAQsiFWQ4aNq1oL095VeJu2zjyvhef7u NavigateAR/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk to upload the APK to Google Drive.
